iterations.label: baseline (pre-design)

topbar.notes: Generic SaaS header; zoom buttons are non-functional no-ops; no project meta surfaced.

graph_canvas.notes: Dot-grid is a tasteful base. Nodes are rounded soft cards (spec antipattern). 3 of 9 modules are rendered off-screen with no pan/scroll to reach them. All leaf modules look identical.

detail_panel.notes: Opens on node-click and shows kind/name/id/description. Layer-nav Back/Next are rendered but do nothing (stuck at 0/0). No findings surfaced. No artefact sections. ~95% empty white space.

artefact_panels.notes: Entirely missing from DOM. Zero decisions/todos/research/reviews/changes sections. Zero filter toggles. Spec §5 unimplemented.

meta_footer.notes: No footer exists. Project name, schema version, generated_at from /api/meta are never rendered. Spec §7 unimplemented.

adversarial.mobile_tested: simulated via body max-width clamp; true mobile viewport resize was blocked by OS window minimum
clipping: graph-region clips 3 rightmost module nodes (~1021px of content) at default 1440 viewport
'Parser' node label is visibly cut mid-word on the right edge of the canvas
no pan affordance, no horizontal scroll inside #graph, no fade indicator
non_functional_controls: Reset button (does not restore collapsed nodes; does not change transform)
missing_features: meta/schema footer with project name, schema_version, generated_at
lint findings inside the detail panel
paths list / contracts list / files list / tags / dependents / depends-on on node detail
monospace typography for IDs, paths, file references, contract names
spec_violations: Typography: node IDs rendered in Inter sans-serif instead of monospace (spec §Aesthetic direction)
Anti-pattern: rounded cards with subtle shadows on node UI (spec §Anti-patterns)
Anti-pattern: generic pill badge styling for CAIRN_CONTRACT_MISSING (spec wants restrained severity treatment)
Feature gap: ≥65% of spec feature surface area not implemented (artefact panels, filters, footer, layer nav, zoom)

keyIssues: Graph clips 3 of 9 module nodes off-screen with no way to reach them
All three toolbar buttons (Zoom out / Zoom in / Reset) are non-functional
Layer-nav Back / Next are rendered but do nothing (permanent 0 / 0 counter)
Artefact panels, filter toggles, and schema footer are entirely absent from the DOM
Detail panel shows 4 short lines then ~800px of empty whitespace
Lint findings render on node cards but are never surfaced inside the detail panel
Node IDs set in proportional sans-serif instead of monospace
Topbar reads as generic SaaS dashboard chrome with no project context
iterations.biggest_opportunity: The data plumbing works end-to-end. Refining is a build-out task (fill in the missing 60-75% of the spec) rather than a rescue task (nothing is fundamentally broken). A single coordinated pass that (a) adds the artefact + footer + findings surfaces, (b) switches IDs to mono, (c) redesigns nodes away from rounded-card-with-shadow aesthetic, and (d) wires the existing non-functional controls would move the score materially.

iterations.label: iter-1 (first design-implement pass)

topbar.notes: Masthead with mark + hairline + sub-mark + mono meta strip (project / schema / generated) + connected zoom strip landed. Reset is a no-op (hard-caps Func at 5); zoom in/out and drag-pan work; glyphs mono; zero radius; zero shadow.

graph_canvas.notes: All 9 modules present in DOM; typographic square nodes with mono IDs, kind-eyebrow, warm substrate fills; finding indicator is 16x16 corner tab with ! glyph; edges unlabeled; selected-node stroke is 2px inset ochre. Fit-to-viewport fits the full SVG viewBox rather than the content bbox so nodes cluster bottom-left and ~68% of canvas reads as dead dot-grid (hard-caps Craft at 6).

detail_panel.notes: Panel now renders header (MODULE eyebrow / name / mono ID) + description + FINDINGS with severity margin mark + PATHS / CONTRACTS / DEPENDENTS / STATE, hiding empty blocks. Layer-nav 'BACK 0/0 NEXT' renders on every node (violates design §5.3 item 4 which says hide when layers=0 - hard-caps Func at 6). Close button works but shell grid doesn't reflow; 380px empty column remains. Esc does not close.

meta_footer.notes: Correctly merged into topbar per design §6. Project name / schema version / generated ISO all mono, middle-dot separators, faint-ink labels. Removes the iter-0 'missing' defect by relocation not invention.

artefact_panels.notes: Sprint contract moved these out of scope this iteration. Detail panel does render per-kind labeled blocks (paths, contracts, dependents, state) which partially cover the intent. Full expandable-artefact-card design (§5.3 item 5) not exercisable against current fixture - no fixture node has decisions/todos/research rows.

adversarial.mobile_tested_note: Chrome OS window-min-width clamp prevented shrinking to 390px; @media (max-width: 480px) block in CSS defines position:fixed bottom:0 height:70vh, 180ms linear slide-up, 32x3px square drag handle - structurally compliant, visual verification blocked.
non_functional_controls: Reset view button (no-op; transform does not revert to fit-scale after zoom-in)
Esc key does not close panel (nice-to-have, not blocker)
partial_functional_controls: Layer-nav Back/Next click handlers exist but no fixture node has >0 artefacts so real advancement could not be verified
Close-panel: hides correctly but shell grid doesn't reflow; 380px dead column persists
spec_violations: Fit-to-viewport fits SVG viewBox (3200x2000) not the content bounding box; nodes cluster bottom-left
Layer-nav renders '← BACK 0 / 0 NEXT →' for every node (design §5.3 says hide when layers=0)
Reset view is a no-op (design §4.1 says 'snap back to fit-scale with a 160ms linear transition')
System/container nodes show a 'collapse' text label inside the node body (design §4.2 says only kind+name+ID)

keyIssues: Reset view button is a no-op
Layer-nav shows '0 / 0' on every node (spec says hide when 0 layers)
Fit-to-viewport fits the SVG viewBox not the content bbox; graph appears bottom-left-weighted with ~68% dead dot-grid
Shell grid does not reflow on panel close; 380px empty column persists
Esc key does not close the panel
System/container nodes render 'collapse' text inside node body (not in design spec)
Artefact expandable cards not exercisable against current fixture - coverage gap for §5.3 item 5
iterations.biggest_opportunity: Iter-1 nailed the visual identity (typography, color discipline, square zero-radius nodes, masthead, mono IDs, finding tabs, token system). The remaining gap is all functional polish: 4 shallow code fixes (Reset, layer-nav hide, fit-to-content-bbox, grid reflow) should push Craft and Functionality over 7.0/8.0 respectively. No re-architecture needed.
iterations.recommendation_for_iter_2_evaluator: Mandatory full interaction sweep: every zoom button (including repeated clicks to verify stacking), drag-pan in two directions, click system + container + leaf-module node, collapse-expand a container, close-and-reopen rotation (node A -> close -> node B -> close -> node C with stale-state check), layer-nav against a node with >0 artefacts (probe /api/node/X to find one), mobile bottom sheet via DevTools emulation since OS clamp blocks true 390px resize, light-mode emulation via DevTools since OS prefers-dark forced dark here, Tab-focus ring verification. No SHIP decision without that sweep passing.

iterations.label: iter-2 (refine after iter-1)

delta_checklist.1_fit_to_content_bbox_on_load: FAIL - fit never engages at initial load; .graph style.transform is 'translate(0px, 0px) scale(1)' after fresh navigation; natural 2105x385 content overflows 1477-wide viewport; ReconcilerInterface clipped mid-word, Reconciliation and CodeReconciler off-canvas
delta_checklist.2_reset_view_with_transition: FAIL (partial) - DOM-dispatched click DOES fire reset, transition is 0.16s linear per spec, but post-close Reset occasionally lands on scale(0.467) vs expected ~0.655
delta_checklist.3_layer_nav_hidden: FAIL - hidden attribute set but CSS .layer-nav { display: grid } overrides [hidden] default; BACK 0/0 NEXT renders on every node in fixture
delta_checklist.4_close_panel_grid_reflow: PARTIAL - shell grid correctly reflows 1097px 380px -> 1477px on close (PASS); but the re-fit computes wrong scale (0.467 vs 0.655) so graph visibly shrinks when canvas grows
delta_checklist.5_esc_close_and_focus_ring: PASS - Escape keydown closes panel; .panel-close outline rgb(228 153 88) on open, fades within ~500ms
delta_checklist.6_chevron_replaces_collapse_text: PASS - literal 'collapse' word absent from node bodies; .node-chevron-tab rendered on SYSTEM Cairn and CONTAINER Kernel only with title='Collapse' tooltip; leaf modules have no chevron; chevron click hides container children
delta_checklist.7_sweep_polish: PARTIAL - orphan FINDINGS section header renders on Cairn despite 0 findings; no fixture exercise for artefact empty state

sweep.zoom_out_floor: PASS - floors at fitScale 0.645 after 3 zoom-outs
sweep.reset_from_zoomed: PASS - 160ms linear transition back to fit when clicked from a zoomed state
sweep.drag_pan_two_directions: PASS - translate shifts (-203,315) -> (-433,86) on diagonal drag at scale 0.853
sweep.pan_at_fitscale_clamp: PASS - translate unchanged at fitScale per spec
sweep.node_rotation_cairn_kernel_parser_artefa: PASS - panel content refreshes cleanly on each click; no stale state; CAIRN_CONTRACT_MISSING finding renders on Artefacts
sweep.close_rotation: PASS - shell grid reflows each cycle; no console errors
sweep.esc_canvas_close_button_all_close: PASS - all three paths work; no double-fire
sweep.layer_nav_with_multi_artefact_node: NOT REACHABLE - no fixture node has any artefacts; probed /api/node/X for first 11 nodes, all return 0 decisions/todos/research/reviews/changes
sweep.mobile_390x844_bottom_sheet: NOT LIVE VERIFIABLE - OS clamps window to ~1477px minimum; CSS @media (max-width: 480px) structurally compliant with fixed inset 30vh 0 0 0, translateY(100%) slide, 36x4px sheet handle
sweep.dark_tokens: PASS - --cairn-paper hsl(32 8% 11%), --cairn-ink hsl(38 20% 92%), --cairn-accent hsl(28 72% 62%) all resolve; warm-graphite palette in effect
sweep.console_clean: PASS - zero error|warn|Uncaught across full flow

topbar.notes: Masthead unchanged structurally. Mono meta strip landed. Zoom buttons work when invoked via DOM click; Reset sometimes produces wrong fit scale after a panel-close perturbation.

graph_canvas.notes: Typographic vocabulary still strong (chevron tab is a clean addition). Fit-to-content-bbox does NOT engage at load; initial frame shows ReconcilerInterface clipped and Reconciliation, CodeReconciler off-canvas. Post-close re-fit lands on wrong scale. Hard caps Craft at 4 and Functionality at 4.

detail_panel.notes: Header + description + findings + metadata tail all right. BUT layer-nav '0/0' renders on every node despite hidden attribute (CSS specificity bug). Orphan FINDINGS header renders when findings array is empty. Panel-open focus ring on close X landed cleanly.

meta_strip.notes: Unchanged from iter-1. Cairn / schema v1 / generated ISO mono.

mobile_bottom_sheet.notes: Not live verifiable due to OS window clamp. CSS structurally compliant with bottom sheet rule, sheet handle, overscroll-contain. Scores held at 6 pending live verification.

adversarial.light_mode_not_verified: OS prefers-color-scheme: dark forced; DevTools emulation not applied this iteration
adversarial.mobile_not_live_verified: OS window clamp prevents true 390px resize
spec_violations: Fit-to-viewport does not run at initial load (delta 1)
Post-close re-fit produces wrong scale (delta 4 composition side)
FINDINGS section header renders with zero findings (delta 7)

keyIssues: Initial-load fit never runs; 3 of 11 nodes clipped off-screen on first paint
Layer-nav still renders BACK 0/0 NEXT on every node despite hidden attribute (CSS specificity bug)
Post-close re-fit lands on wrong scale (0.467 vs expected 0.655); graph shrinks when canvas grows
Orphan FINDINGS section header renders when findings array is empty
Regression vs iter-1 on Design Quality, Craft, and Functionality
Mobile and light-mode still not live verifiable this iteration
iterations.decision_reasoning: REFINE not PIVOT. Originality held at 7 and chevron tab + focus ring are genuine positive deltas. The regressions are all same-class bugs in the fit-transform pipeline and CSS specificity. The aesthetic direction is right; the implementation needs one more tight pass to nail the fit-on-load, the layer-nav hide, the post-close re-fit math, and the empty FINDINGS suppression.
iterations.biggest_opportunity: Four shallow fixes (1. run fit on DOMContentLoaded + rAF + load + resize, 2. one-line CSS .layer-nav[hidden] { display: none !important } or cascade fix, 3. re-fit pipeline reads fresh viewport after grid reflow, 4. suppress FINDINGS header when empty) take iter-3 from 5.20 to the 7.2+ ship bar in a single pass, without touching the aesthetic. No re-architecture.
